title: Bulk Delete Guardrail
content:
When not required anymore you can delete any Guardrails.
=== "Kelvin UI" In this brief demo you can see how to do this; To start, click on **Guardrails** in the Contextualization section of the left side bar. Check the box for all Guardrails you want to delete. You will see a new **Delete** button appear at the top of the list. Click on the **Delete** button. In the popup you will confirm your action by typing **PERMANENTLY DELETE** in the text box and clicking on the **Delete** button. Congratulations, you have delete multiple Asset / Data Stream pair Guardrails. === "Kelvin API" ```bash title="API cURL Example" linenums="1" curl -X 'POST' \ 'https:///api/v4/guardrails/bulk/delete' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer " \ -H 'accept: application/json' \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d '{"resources":[ "krn:ad:bp_44/motor_speed_setpoint", "krn:ad:press_line_05/motor_speed_setpoint" ] }' ``` You will get a 200 response if successful. === "Kelvin API Client (Python)" Currently this is not possible in the Kelvin Python API client.

code_examples.code:
curl -X 'POST' \
    'https://<url.kelvin.ai>/api/v4/guardrails/bulk/delete' \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer <Your Current Token>" \
    -H 'accept: application/json' \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d '{"resources":[
            "krn:ad:bp_44/motor_speed_setpoint",
            "krn:ad:press_line_05/motor_speed_setpoint"
            ]
        }'
code_examples.title: API cURL Example
